title: Paris Urban Quality Index
description: Arrondissement-level UQI with historically staggered utility rollout (Haussmann west-to-east gradient) and cumulative transit/amenity investment.

sourceNotes.population: INSEE Dossier Complet POP T1; pre-1968 from historical arrondissement tables.
sourceNotes.density: Population divided by fixed arrondissement area.
sourceNotes.transit_access: Wikidata/OSM metro stations cumulative by decade.
sourceNotes.dwellings: Population divided by persons per dwelling.
sourceNotes.electricity: Historical Paris electrification estimates; 1930+ near universal.
sourceNotes.piped_water: Haussmann-era water network expansion; 1900+ near universal intramuros.
sourceNotes.drainage: Haussmann sewer network; 1920+ near universal intramuros.
sourceNotes.hospital_access: Paris Open Data hospitals + historical hospital catalog.
sourceNotes.green_space: opendata.paris.fr espaces_verts + dated major park openings.

method: Equal-weight UQI using selected variables, min-max normalized within decade.
